hero.title: Support, Protection and Care
hero.subtitle: We support vulnerable groups by providing them with social, legal and psychological assistance

testing.title: Feminist Principles
testing.description: We are guided by feminist principles and actively work to improve women's lives, contributing to the formation of gender values.

support.title: Anti-Discrimination
support.description: We prevent and eliminate the causes of discrimination against women, work to change patriarchal systems, and protect women's rights and freedoms.

medical.title: Quality of Life
medical.description: We strive to improve women's quality of life by uniting the efforts of the community and the state.

education.title: Leadership and Development
education.description: We work to promote the growth of women's role in society, their involvement in political and public life, and support the development of leadership qualities and entrepreneurship.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Helping people since 2017
about.description: Contributing to the development of civil society, economic, political and social reforms in Ukraine, protecting rights and freedoms, improving the quality of life of vulnerable women through the combined efforts of the community and the state

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: We provide comprehensive support to vulnerable groups, including social, legal and psychological assistance. We strive to create a safe environment where everyone can receive the help they need without fear or discrimination.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.text: A society where all people, regardless of status, have equal rights, access to quality healthcare and social support. We seek systemic changes that ensure justice and dignity for all.

beneficiaries.title: ORGANIZATION BENEFICIARIES
groups: Women and girls and teenage boys in areas where military operations are ongoing, who have experienced/are at high risk of sexual violence and other abuse
Survivors of sexual violence who do not have access to life-saving services, including clinical management of rape cases
Elderly women and persons with disabilities who remain in Ukraine due to immobility and are at risk of sexual violence and GBV, including by military and armed personnel
Women in Ukraine experiencing domestic violence, pregnant and nursing women
Women combatants (some of whom may become prisoners of war) and medical personnel who are attacked
Internally displaced persons (IDPs), female-headed households who are leaving and are at high risk of GBV
LGBTI+ persons who face persecution by armed forces, and transgender persons are denied exit from Ukraine due to lack of documents
Women and girls at risk of sexual exploitation and survival sex
Representatives of other nationalities, such as students and migrants, especially Black and ethnic minorities – non-citizens who face persecution and discrimination at the border
Women who use drugs who have difficulty accessing treatment and support
Women and girls living with HIV or suffering from AIDS who have difficulty accessing medication and support

Ukrainian citizens who have left for Poland, Romania, Hungary, Moldova, Slovakia, Belarus and other countries, who are almost all women and children and are at risk of GBV, sexual exploitation and human trafficking
Roma, who have historically experienced and continue to experience discrimination in the current crisis

hero.title: Areas of Activity
hero.subtitle: Comprehensive support and services for vulnerable groups

social.title: SOCIAL SERVICES
services: Referral to NGOs for additional social services
Referral to government institutions for services
Collection and meeting urgent needs of beneficiaries
Provision of information and educational materials

humanitarian.title: HUMANITARIAN SERVICES
services: Transportation to the border of Ukraine for crossing

psychological.title: PSYCHOLOGICAL AND MEDICAL SERVICES
services: Self-help groups and psychological information sessions
Conducting workshops and art therapy activities
Assistance in obtaining medical examination and treatment
Referral to medical and preventive institutions
Training in self-employment, leadership and personal growth
Counseling and testing for HIV/AIDS and COVID-19

other.title: OTHER CONSULTATIONS, SERVICES AND REFERRALS
services: Consultations on concluding a declaration with a family doctor
Referral to the border for those wishing to leave Ukraine
Assistance in finding free temporary housing

grid.noTenders: No active tenders at the moment

annualReports.title: ANNUAL REPORTS
annualReports.contactNote: To receive the full report, please contact us

footer.description: Women's Center NGO - Support, Protection and Care. We provide comprehensive support to vulnerable groups
